🌞 Can you clean 100 panels today?

Solar Clean - Solar Panel Cleaning Game

Solar Clean is a free fun mobile game where you clean solar panels. The game features 10 levels, equipment and upgrades, a global leaderboard and more. Play on any mobile device or desktop browser - no download required.

How to Play Solar Clean

Use the virtual joystick to move your character across the solar panel field. Press the clean button to sweep dust, remove bird droppings and clear leaves from solar panels. Each clean panel earns you points. Fill your water tank by standing near the water container. Use salt to remove stubborn bird poop.

Game Features

  • 10 challenging levels with increasing difficulty
  • Isometric 3D graphics with smooth animations
  • Upgrades and special equipment in the Bank
  • Global leaderboard with weekly rankings
  • Secret bonus stage - find all green uniforms to unlock
  • Daily panel cleaning goals with streak rewards
  • Multiple character cosmetic options
  • Two environments: Grass Field and Rooftop
  • Works offline after first load

Why Clean Solar Panels?

Dirty solar panels can lose 15-25% of their energy output. Dust, bird droppings, and leaves block sunlight and reduce efficiency. Regular cleaning is essential for maximum power production. Solar Clean raises awareness about this important maintenance task in a fun, engaging way.

About Solar Clean

Solar Clean was developed by Yaniv Waldman as a fun educational mobile game. It promotes awareness of renewable energy maintenance and the importance of keeping solar panels clean for optimal energy production efficiency.

Privacy Policy

Solar Clean may display advertisements via Google AdSense. We use localStorage to save your game progress, player name, and high scores on your device only. We do not collect, store, or share personal information on our servers. By playing you agree to Google's Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

For questions contact us through solarpanelclean.github.io

📖 HOW TO PLAY

🕹️ Controls

Use the joystick (bottom-left) to walk your cleaner around the solar panels. Press the Clean button (bottom-right) when you are standing next to a dirty panel to clean it.

🌞 Goal

Clean as many solar panels as possible before the 2-minute timer runs out. Each level adds more panels. Reach Level 10 to become the Master of Cleaning!

⭐ Scoring

• Clean a dirty panel → +500 pts
• Remove bird poop → +750 pts
• Remove a leaf → +750 pts
• Your score is saved to the global leaderboard

💧 Water & 🧂 Salt

Your water tank depletes as you clean. Walk to the blue water tank to refill. At higher levels a salt tank appears — salt removes stubborn stains faster.

🐦 Watch Out for Birds!

Sparrows, pigeons and crows fly in and dirty your panels. Crows make the biggest mess! Clean the poop quickly for bonus points.

🏦 Bank & Shop

Press Bank during the game to spend your points on upgrades: a bigger mop, extra water tank, auto-clean sprinklers, extra time, and cosmetic outfits for your cleaner.

🌞 Daily Goal

Clean 100 panels every day to build a streak. Achieve 5 days in a row and earn a 1,000,000 bonus points on day 6!
